title: Discrete Log Equivalency (DLEQ)
description: DLEQ proofs show two public keys share the same secret scalar without revealing that scalar. They are building blocks for adaptor signatures, atomic swaps, and scriptless constructions.

resources.title: Bitcoin Optech Topic: Discrete Log Equivalency
resources.notes: Bitcoin-focused usage of DLEQ in contract and signing protocols.

resources.title: Bitcoin Optech Topic: Adaptor Signatures
resources.notes: Practical relation between DLEQ and adaptor signature flows.

resources.title: Mastering the Lightning Network
resources.notes: Useful context on scriptless protocols that use DLEQ-like constructs.
